channel.title: Benchmark PS Blog
channel.description: Practical insights on physiotherapy outcomes, MSK measurement, and evidence-based practice.

item.title: Why Physiotherapy Clinics That Measure Outcomes Retain More Patients (and Charge More)
item.description: Discover how outcome measurement drives patient retention and premium pricing in physiotherapy clinics. Evidence-based strategies for practice growth.

item.title: The Business Case for Outcome Measurement in Physiotherapy Clinics
item.description: Discover how objective outcome measurement transforms physiotherapy clinics through improved clinical decisions, enhanced efficiency, and stronger referral relationships.

item.title: How to Implement Objective Physiotherapy Assessment Without Expensive Equipment
item.description: Learn practical methods for implementing objective physiotherapy assessment using cost-effective tools and standardised protocols without expensive equipment.

item.title: MSK Outcome Benchmarks: What Good Conservative Care Actually Looks Like
item.description: Evidence-based MSK outcome benchmarks that define effective conservative care. Learn what good physiotherapy results actually look like in practice.

item.title: Evidence-Based Progression in Physiotherapy: A Framework for Time-Pressured Clinicians
item.description: A practical framework for evidence-based physiotherapy progression using standardised measurement tools to improve patient outcomes in time-pressured clinical settings.

item.title: Why 43% of Physiotherapy Care Is Non-Recommended — and What Clinics Can Do About It
item.description: Research shows 43% of physiotherapy treatments don't follow clinical guidelines. Learn why this happens and practical steps to improve evidence-based care delivery.

item.title: Staffing Mix and Physiotherapy Margins: How Standardised Care Reduces Senior Clinician Dependency
item.description: How standardised physiotherapy protocols enable junior clinicians to deliver consistent outcomes, reducing senior staffing costs and improving clinic margins.

item.title: ACL Return-to-Sport Testing: Which Criteria Actually Predict Re-Injury Risk
item.description: Evidence-based analysis of ACL return-to-sport testing criteria that actually predict re-injury risk, with practical implementation guidance for physiotherapy practice.

item.title: The State of Technology in Physiotherapy: What Works, What Doesn't, and What's Coming
item.description: Evidence-based review of physiotherapy technology adoption: what digital tools work in practice, implementation barriers, and emerging trends for UK clinics.

item.title: The Economic Case for Better MSK Conservative Care
item.description: How objective measurement transforms MSK physiotherapy from cost centre to value creator. Evidence-based strategies for demonstrating clinical ROI.

item.title: Knee Osteoarthritis and Conservative Care: Setting Realistic Expectations With Objective Data
item.description: How objective measurement transforms knee osteoarthritis care by setting realistic expectations and improving treatment decisions for better patient outcomes.
